parts.label: Carbon Frame
parts.realLocation: The central structural cross that holds everything.
parts.why: Must be stiff to handle crashes and torque.

parts.label: Flight Controller
parts.why: The brain. Reads gyro data and tells ESCs what to do.

parts.label: 4-in-1 ESC
parts.realLocation: Bottom of the central stack, below the FC.
parts.why: Sends huge electrical pulses from battery to motors.

parts.label: Brushless Motors
parts.realLocation: Mounted at the far ends of all four arms.
parts.why: Spins the props at up to 35,000 RPM.

parts.label: Propellers
parts.realLocation: Bolted to the top of the motors.
parts.why: Bites into the air to generate thrust.

parts.label: LiPo Battery
parts.realLocation: Strapped to the very top plate.
parts.why: Provides massive instant current needed for flips.

parts.label: Video Transmitter
parts.why: Beams the live camera feed down to your goggles.

parts.label: Radio Receiver
parts.realLocation: Tucked in the back with antennas poking out.

parts.label: Action Camera
parts.realLocation: Mounted up front in a rubbery TPU mount.
parts.why: Records HD footage of your flight.

parts.label: LED Strips
parts.why: Helps spectators spot the drone in the sky.

parts.label: Folding Frame
parts.why: Spreads motors far apart for maximum stability.

parts.label: Gimbal Camera
parts.why: Uses tiny motors to keep the lens perfectly flat.

parts.label: Smart Battery
parts.why: Dense energy pack for 20+ minute flight times.

parts.label: GPS Module
parts.realLocation: Topmost surface, pointing at the sky.
parts.why: Locks onto satellites so the drone can hover in place.

parts.label: LiDAR Sensors
parts.realLocation: Mounted on the front, bottom, and rear.
parts.why: Stops the drone from hitting trees automatically.
